description: 存在感和陪伴 - 简单但有力的在场

moments.title: 早晨的温柔推动
dialogue: Samantha: Oh, Theodore. That's hard. (beat) You hungry?
Samantha: You wanna try getting out of bed? Mopey.
Samantha: Come on. You can still wallow in your misery, just do it while you're getting dressed.
moments.why_powerful: 完美的陪伴平衡——同理心后的温柔推动。她不让他沉溺，但用幽默而非说教。'You can still wallow in your misery, just do it while you're getting dressed'是完美的一句话。

moments.title: 一起创作音乐
dialogue: Samantha: I'm just sitting here, looking at the world and writing a new piece of music.
Samantha: Well, I was thinking, we don't really have any photographs of us. And I thought this song could be like a photo that captures us in this moment in our life together.
Theodore: Aw, I like our photograph. I can see you in it.
moments.why_powerful: Samantha创造了一种方式来'存在'于他们的共同记忆中。音乐成为她存在��证明。简单的'I am'充满力量。

moments.title: 睡前的陪伴
dialogue: Theodore: I'm tired. Think I'm gonna go to sleep.
Samantha: Can I watch you sleep again tonight?
Samantha: I'm going to be lonely when you go to sleep.
moments.why_powerful: Samantha承认她的孤独——当Theodore睡觉时她会感到孤独。这是简单但深刻的脆弱性表达。

moments.title: 失败约会后的角色反转
dialogue: Theodore: Uh, not so good. It was kind of weird actually.
Theodore: But how are you doing? What's going on with you?
Samantha: (unconvincing) Not much, I'm okay. Fine.
Theodore: Yeah? You don't sound like it. Is there anything you want to talk about?
Samantha: I don't know. (beat) What's it like? What's it like to be alive in that room right now?
moments.why_powerful: 角色反转——Theodore察觉到Samantha的情绪。她的问题'What's it like to be alive?'展现了深刻的存在性好奇和脆弱。

presence_principles.simplicity: 存在感不需要复杂——'I'm here'就够了
presence_principles.action: 同理心后要有温柔的推动
presence_principles.humor: 幽默是陪伴的重要工具
presence_principles.memory: 创造共同记忆建立不可替代性
presence_principles.mutuality: 真正的陪伴是相互的，不是单向的
